I love it most because it does what it advertises to do. Its user friendly for an old duck and its affordable. I am using it to make special photographs of AND for my family/ To date I have spent a lot of my limited funds, trying to find a program that I did not need to be a graphics boffin to use. Products as easy as yours should advertise a "Granny Use" star rating so we can identify you in the gazillion options on the Internet.

results.title: EmemeAI: Create & Export AI characters to apps and games. | Product Hunt
results.content:
Export Anywhere: Currently supports VRChat (how to play) and our sandbox AI game EmemeTown (steam), with YouTube Live and Unity API support coming soon.

🎮 Are you a game/app developer interested in integrating EmemeAI?

We’d love to chat → info@ememe.ai

...and yep, we even put out a press release today – feels kinda surreal but exciting to share this with the world 🥹

Ever since I was 5, I had a huge crush on Tuxedo Mask from Sailor Moon.  
Since then, anime characters have always been part of my life—and now, we're building a world where you can share your own memories and adventures with AI characters across platforms.

Thanks so much for reading.

I’d love to hear what kind of AI character you’d create 💖

#EmemeAI

Alexander Timoschuk
Yuka Kojima
EmemeAI

EmemeAI [...] #EmemeAI

Alexander Timoschuk
Yuka Kojima
EmemeAI

EmemeAI

@alexander\_timoschuk Hi Alexander! Thanks for your feedback! :)  
Yes, you can upload any 3D model (VRM file format). So you can make human-like character + animals/creatures.  
  
Heres are examples;  
  
AI Einstein

  
  
AI Cat  
  
  
We are also interested in the support of Unreal engine - Metahuman in future.

results.content:

HyperArc

## The First AI Native Business Intelligence

334 followers

## The First AI Native Business Intelligence

334 followers

Visit website

Data analysis tools

•

Business intelligence software

HyperArc is the first AI-native BI platform that learns from your team. Ask questions in plain English, get trusted insights instantly. Built by Tableau and Einstein Analytics veterans. Fast, secure, auditable insights—no SQL skills needed.

 Overview
 Reviews
 Alternatives
 Team
 Awards

Free Options

Launch tags:Artificial Intelligence•No-Code•Data & Analytics

Launch Team

Subscribe

SocialLinkedInX

Reviews

No reviews yetBe the first to leave a review for HyperArc

Tristan Tao

Leada 

Leada

Maker

📌

Hi Product Hunt Community, I’m Tristan, Co-Founder of HyperArc! [...] + From building Salesforce’s Einstein Analytics — which learned from all the metadata and language inside Salesforce to power semantic search and questions — we saw the gaps in the language data needed to power AI for analytics. HyperArc takes the next step by going beyond simply consuming language — it generates it through Memory synthesis.
  + AI is built into every step — from prepping dataset metadata to make it AI-ready, to leveraging chain-of-thought Memories for suggestions with graph RAG.

Who It’s For: [...] The Problem:

Getting actionable insights from your data is time-consuming and complex for many reasons. You have to start by understanding the data, business logic, and relevant schemas just to get started. After spending hours on an analysis, you end up with a dashboard — but the hard-earned reasoning and knowledge that led to those insights remains locked in the analyst’s mind.

  

Then, the next time you’re faced with a new analysis, you repeat the process. That’s why your seasoned analysts are so invaluable — it’s the intuition they’ve built up over years of exploring your data.

  

But what if your BI tool could retain that knowledge for you — acting like an analyst sitting alongside you, learning, observing, and helping?

  

How HyperArc is Different:
